group.name: 70's Light Organs
group.description: Classic 70's colour organ effects driven by audio frequency analysis, spectral gates, and per-band onset detection

cues.name: Three-Band Color Organ
cues.description: Bass, mid, and treble bands each drive a colour on a separate section (classic SCR colour organ), with spectral gates for tonal vs noise separation.

variables.name: bandLevel
variables.description: Current audio-trigger band amplitude (0–1) for opacity

variables.name: totalLights
variables.description: Configured light count for group targeting

variables.name: targetGroups
variables.description: Target groups (front only when ≤4 lights, front+back when >4)

cues.name: Beat Strobe
cues.description: White flash on every detected beat with a fast decay to black; onset gating reduces false triggers.

cues.name: Bass & Cymbal
cues.description: Warm red wash on bass energy with amber HFC flashes for cymbals and snares; spectral and onset gating for cleaner separation.

variables.name: bandLevel
variables.description: Current audio-trigger band amplitude (0–1) for opacity

cues.name: Quarter Chase
cues.description: Each beat advances a lit quarter around the front array (disco chase sequencer); onset gating tightens beat following.

variables.name: chasePos
variables.description: Beat counter (starts at 3 so first beat lands on quarter 1 / red)

cues.name: Quarter Chase Random
cues.description: Each beat advances a lit quarter around the front array with a random colour per step (disco chase sequencer); onset gating tightens beat following.

variables.name: chasePos
variables.description: Beat counter (starts at 3 so first beat lands on quarter 1 / red)

variables.name: chaseColor
variables.description: Random colour for the active quarter this beat

cues.name: Eight-Band Spectrum
cues.description: Eight fixed bands (Rhythm Game ranges) with EQ palette colours on front and back quarters.

variables.name: bandLevel
variables.description: Current audio-trigger band amplitude (0–1) for opacity

cues.name: Drum Isolation
cues.description: Kick, snare, and hi-hat triggers using instrument preset ranges and spectral gates.

variables.name: bandLevel
variables.description: Current audio-trigger band amplitude (0–1) for opacity
